master_principle.name: Nested triadic architecture of recursive viability
master_principle.statement: Recursive viability structures organize through nested triads of generation, stabilization, and continuation.
master_principle.deep_compression: Adaptive existence persists through recursively renewed triads of selectable futures, recoverable accessibility, and transformational continuity.

triads.name: Recoverability Triad
triads.role: Defines recoverable transformational continuity and recursive reconstitution of accessibility fibers.

triads.name: Collapse Inverse Triad
triads.role: Defines the inverse pathway of recoverable accessibility degeneration.

canonical_compressions: Existence = recursive renewal of selectable futures.
Collapse = exhaustion of recursively renewable futures.
Adaptive viability is the geometry of recoverable future transformational accessibility.
Collapse occurs when regenerative accessibility fibers can no longer be rewoven.
